action.text: if exists(select 1 from dmcpnh where ma_cp = @ma_cp) begin select rtrim(a.ma_thue) as ma_thue, b.thue_suat from dmcpnh a join dmthue b on a.ma_thue = b.ma_thue where a.ma_cp = @ma_cp return end

query.text: select @@fieldExternal from @@prime$partition$current a left join dmcpnh b on a.ma_cp = b.ma_cp left join dmthue c on b.ma_thue = c.ma_thue where @@whereClause order by @@orderByClause
